name: Easy Beef Stir Fry (Low Fat)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb lean boneless sirloin, trimmed, and cut into 1/4 inch strips
1/2 lb fresh snow pea pods (be sure ends are trimmed and strings are removed)
1/2 cup celery, sliced on the diagonal
1/2 cup red pepper, sliced into strips
3 cups cooked brown rice (use the instant variety - it's great)
Makes 6 servings. Each serving has about 250 calories and 5 grams of fat.
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large zip-lock plastic bag, combine ginger root, orange rind, orange juice, balsamic vinegar, and soy sauce. Zip the bag and mix thoroughly to make marinade.
2. Add meat strips and place in refrigerator for 30-45 minutes.
3. Remove meat strips and add cornstarch to the remaining marinade. Zip the bag and mix the cornstarch into the marinade.
4. Spray a nonstick skillet with nonstick cooking spray and heat to medium high.
5. Add meat strips and stir-fry for 5 minutes.
6. Remove from the skillet.
7. Drizzle sesame oil over the skillet.
8. Add snow peas, bean sprouts, celery, and red pepper and stir-fry for 3 minutes. Add steak strips and reserved marinade and stir-fry an additional 2-3 minutes until slightly thickened.
9. Serve over rice.
